from typing import NamedTuple

class ParseResult(NamedTuple):
    timestamp: str
    level: str
    message: str
    code: int

def parse_log_line(line: str) -> ParseResult:
    parts = line.split(" ", 3)
    return ParseResult(parts[0], parts[1], parts[2], int(parts[3]))

class UserStats(NamedTuple):
    total_posts: int
    avg_score: float
    top_category: str
    is_premium: bool
    follower_count: int

def get_user_stats(user_id: int) -> UserStats:
    return UserStats(
        total_posts=42,
        avg_score=3.7,
        top_category="tech",
        is_premium=True,
        follower_count=128,
    )

class FileMetadata(NamedTuple):
    name: str
    size: int
    mime_type: str
    encoding: str

def extract_file_metadata(path: str) -> FileMetadata:
    return FileMetadata(
        name=path.split("/")[-1],
        size=1024,
        mime_type="text/plain",
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

def get_user_score(user_id: int) -> tuple[float, int]:
    return 4.5, 128
